ham.subject: Transaction Alert – Rs.5,000 Debited from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We wish to inform you that a transaction of Rs.5,000 has been debited from your account ending in 1234 on 15th April 2026. The transaction was made at ABC Store, Mumbai. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at 1800-XXX-XXX.

For more details, click <URL>.

Thank you for banking with State Bank of India.

Regards,
Customer Support
State Bank of India

spam.subject: Income Tax Department – Your Refund is Ready
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

The Income Tax Department has processed your refund for the year 2025. Your refund amount of Rs.1,20,000 is ready for release. To claim your refund, please verify your bank account details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Please note that failure to verify within 5 days may result in delay or forfeiture of your refund.

This is an official communication from the Income Tax Department. For any queries, call our helpline at 1800-XYZ-1234.

Thank you,
Income Tax Department
